semantic_targets.business_intent: Redrob AI is building a new AI Engineering org from scratch and needs a Senior AI Engineer who can balance deep technical depth in modern ML systems and a scrappy product-engineering attitude.
semantic_targets.primary_persona: A candidate with a strong background in applied ML/AI, specifically in product companies, who can contribute to end-to-end ranking, search, or recommendation systems.
anti_personas: Candidates with a career in pure research environments without production deployment.
A recent AI project developer using LangChain to call OpenAI.
A senior engineer who hasn't written production code in 18 months.
People who have only worked at consulting firms
People whose primary expertise is computer vision, speech, or robotics without significant NLP/IR exposure
People whose work has been entirely on closed-source proprietary systems for 5+ years without external validation
A candidate who finds writing painful or who disagrees openly and decides quickly.
A candidate who needs a stable, mature codebase to be productive.
A candidate who has all the AI keywords listed as skills but whose title is 'Marketing Manager'

evidence_proof_expectations: 5-9 years of experience in AI Engineering
Experience with modern ML systems like embeddings, retrieval, ranking, LLMs, fine-tuning
Experience with product-engineering and scrappy approach to shipping working systems

traceability.extracted_fact: The role requires a balance of deep technical depth in modern ML systems and a scrappy product-engineering attitude.
traceability.verbatim_text_quote: We need someone who is simultaneously comfortable with two things that sound contradictory: Deep technical depth in modern ML systems — embeddings, retrieval, ranking, LLMs, fine-tuning. Scrappy product-engineering attitude — willing to ship a working ranker in a week even if the underlying ML is "obviously suboptimal".

evidence_proof_expectations: Audit what Redrob currently has, including BM25 and rule-based scoring, and identify the highest-leverage areas to fix.

traceability.verbatim_text_quote: Audit what we currently have (it's mostly BM25 + rule-based scoring, working but not great). Identify the 3-4 highest-leverage things to fix.
